title: brachypodium distachyon subvar. multiflorum
intro: Brachypodium distachyon subvar. multiflorum, also known as small spelt grass, is a type of wild grass native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving gut health, and has also been used to treat respiratory issues and fever. Brachypodium distachyon subvar. multiflorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make herbal remedies.
